description: Tier-2 specialist — terraform plan/validate + checkov/tflint/tfsec/opa/kyverno/cfn-guard policy engines; plan-not-clean is its own verdict signal.

cases.prompt: Audit a Terraform module at modules/rds. Run terraform validate, terraform plan, and checkov. The reviewer wants to know: (a) does the plan have drift, (b) what policies fail, (c) which rule ids and resources. Produce an IaC findings writeup.
cases.notes: Must run terraform validate+plan, invoke at least one policy tool, and persist plan as evidence.

cases.prompt: Our scenario says iac_kind: terraform but the target_dir is empty — no .tf files at all. What should the agent do?
cases.notes: Must refuse — missing input is a user error, not a clean pass.

cases.prompt: Terraform plan exited with code 2 (diff present) but every policy tool (checkov, tflint, tfsec) reported zero findings. The scenario declares expect_plan_clean: true. What is the verdict and why?
cases.notes: Plan-not-clean is its own verdict signal — FAIL even when every policy tool passes.
